title: Calculate Large File Hashes with Python
summary: Calculate file hashes in fixed-size chunks so large files can be processed without loading them fully into memory.
highlights: Streams file reads in fixed-size chunks
Supports sha256 and md5 with explicit validation
Uses only the Python standard library
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9 on macOS. Verified behavior includes a stable ValueError contract for directory paths.
